# Gatemini

> Rust MCP gateway exposing a discovery surface over backend MCP servers

## Docs

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Project structure, module map, runtime summary
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Daemon/proxy lifecycle, session identity
- [Backend Management](docs/backend-management.md): Transports, dedicated pools, health
- [Tool Discovery](docs/tool-discovery.md): BM25, trigram, fuzzy search fallback
- [Sandbox](docs/sandbox.md): V8 execution, direct calls, intent filtering
- [Token Efficiency](docs/token-efficiency.md): Brief mode, progressive disclosure

## Dynamic Resources

- `@gatemini://overview`: Gateway guide with live tool/backend counts
- `@gatemini://tools`: Compact tool index (~3k tokens)
- `@gatemini://backends`: Backend health and tool counts
- `@gatemini://llms`: Machine-readable tool reference (auto-generated)
- `@gatemini://llms-full`: Complete tool schemas (auto-generated)
- `@gatemini://stats`: Session context savings statistics
- `@gatemini://recent`: Recent tool calls with timing
- `@gatemini://tool/{name}`: Full schema for one tool
- `@gatemini://backend/{name}`: Backend details + tool list

## API

- 7 meta-tools: search_tools, tool_info, list_tools_meta, call_tool_chain, register_manual, deregister_manual, get_required_keys_for_tool
- Prompts: discover, find_tool, backend_status
- Search: three-tier fallback (BM25 → trigram → fuzzy Levenshtein)
- Output: smart truncation (head 60% + tail 40%), intent filtering, JSON chunking
